members.member: Computes the ratio of used surface area.
Returns 0 if the two intervals i1 and i2 are disjoint, or the length of their overlap otherwise.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Core.Graphics.DrawFog(Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Graphics.RenderTarget2D)
member.summary: Draws the fog over the map editor view.

member.summary: The main entry point for the application.

member.summary: Takes a string and a length value. If the string is longer than the length it will cut the string and add a ..., otherwise it will return the original string.
member.param: String to process.
Max length allowed for the string.

member.summary: Recursively prints the referenced command list and all of it's children.
member.param: The command list to print.
The starting indent of commands in this list.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.pnlPreview_DoubleClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Opens the graphic selector window to pick the default graphic for this event page.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.frmEvent_FormClosing(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs)
member.summary: Intercepts the form closing event to ask the user if they want to save their changes or not.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.InitEditor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: This function creates a backup of the event we are editting just in case we canel our revisions. It also populates General lists in our editor (ie. switches/variables) for event spawning conditions. If the event is a common event (not a map entity) we hide the entity Options on the form.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.LoadPage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes all of the form controls with values from the passed event page.
member.param: The index of the page to load.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.ListPageCommands
member.summary: Clears the listbox that displays event commands and re-populates it.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.OpenEditCommand(Intersect.Framework.Core.GameObjects.Events.Commands.EventCommand)
member.summary: Given a new or existing command this creates the window to select to edit it's values.
member.param: The command that will be modified.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.FinishCommandEdit(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resets the form when a user saves a command they are creating or editting.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.CancelCommandEdit(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resets the form when a user cancels editting or creating a new command for the event.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.btnInsert_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Opens the 'Add Command' window in order to insert a command at the select location in the command list.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Editors.Events.FrmEvent.lstEventCommands_DrawItem(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.DrawItemEventArgs)
member.summary: Custom renderer for event commands to draw labels in green for easier visibility.

member.name: T:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper
member.summary: Helper class for drawing grids on s.

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.ColorBackground
member.summary: Mutable background color for all grids, default .

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.ColorForeground
member.summary: Mutable foreground color for all grids (only affects the grid lines, not text color), default .

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.ColorInterpolate(System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates between two colors by a given ratio.

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.ColorSelection
member.summary: Mutable selection tile color for all grids, default .

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.DefaultFont
member.summary: Mutable fallback font for text rendering on grids, default Arial 14pt.

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.DrawGrid(Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.Grid)
member.summary: Creates a bitmap of the given grid.
member.param: the grid to draw
member.returns: a bitmap with the configured grid drawn on it

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.DrawGrid(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridCell[])
member.summary: Creates a bitmap of the given dimensions and renders a grid with the specified dimensions and optional cell contents.
member.param: width of the bitmap in pixels
height of the bitmap in pixels
number of columns the grid should have
number of rows the grid should have
the optional cell contents
member.returns: a bitmap with the configured grid drawn on it

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.DrawGrid(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Drawing.Font,Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridCell[])
member.summary: Creates a bitmap of the given dimensions and renders a grid with the specified dimensions and optional cell contents.
member.param: width of the bitmap in pixels
height of the bitmap in pixels
number of columns the grid should have
number of rows the grid should have
the font to use for text rendering
the optional cell contents
member.returns: a bitmap with the configured grid drawn on it

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.DrawGrid(System.Drawing.Bitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32,Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridCell[])
member.summary: Renders a grid on the provided bitmap with the specified dimensions and optional cell contents.
member.param: the bitmap to render the grid on
number of columns the grid should have
number of rows the grid should have
the optional cell contents
member.returns: a bitmap with the configured grid drawn on it

member.name: M:Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridHelper.DrawGrid(System.Drawing.Bitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Drawing.Font,Intersect.Editor.Forms.Helpers.GridCell[])
member.summary: Renders a grid on the provided bitmap with the specified dimensions and optional cell contents.
member.param: the bitmap to render the grid on
number of columns the grid should have
number of rows the grid should have
the font to use for text rendering
the optional cell contents
member.returns: a bitmap with the configured grid drawn on it

member.name: F:Intersect.Editor.Networking.Network.ServerStatusPingInterval
member.summary: Interval between status pings in ms (e.g. full, bad version, etc.)

member.name: T:Intersect.Editor.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Intersect.Editor.Properties.Resources.layer
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.
